flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Concordia College at Moorhead fell 37% between 2021 and 2024 (71.2% → 44.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Concordia College at Moorhead fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (74.2% → 61.1%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Concordia College at Moorhead rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.0k → $31.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Concordia College at Moorhead rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.0k → $31.2k).
